author: sankalpsharmaa
description: Syncs today's Apple Reminders into your daily note's TODO section, with notes and priority indicators. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Sankalp Sharma
manifest.description: Syncs today's Apple Reminders into your daily note's TODO section, with notes and priority indicators.
manifest.name: Apple Reminders Sync

name: Apple Reminders Sync

releases.author: sankalpsharmaa
releases.description:
Initial release.

- Syncs today's Apple Reminders into daily note TODO section
- Includes reminder notes and priority indicators
- Auto-sync on configurable interval (default 5 min)
- Deduplicates on re-sync
- Configurable excluded lists
- Requires reminders-cli (`brew install keith/formulae/reminders-cli`)
- macOS only
